runners.name: Billy No Mates
runners.spotlight: Began this season with two perfectly respectable 1m6f runs last month (good/soft) and continues to edge down the weights but his last win was in 2023 and he's not the percentage call in this field.
runners.comment: Began season with two respectable 1m6f runs but his last win came in 2023

runners.name: Ned Broy
runners.spotlight: Launched hurdling career with three low-key runs in February-April but placed twice since returned to the Flat, latterly when close third in first-time cheekpieces at Newcastle (1m4f, AW) this month; big player if suited by today's longer trip.
runners.comment: Close third over 1m4f in new cheekpieces this month; big player if this longer trip suits

runners.name: Ebony Maw
runners.spotlight: Won over C&D in 2024 and is well handicapped on some of last year's placed efforts; yet to strike form after two starts this year but is of renewed interest now that tongue-tie and cheekpieces are refitted; versatile regarding ground; dangerous to ignore.
runners.comment: C&D winner; yet to strike form this year but has headgear refitted today; interesting

runners.name: Tracker Issue
runners.spotlight: Ex-Irish 4yo who went close at Newcastle (12.4f, AW) last November; tailed off in next three runs but he showed signs of a revival with his front-running fourth in a Catterick handicap (2m, good to firm; first-time blinkers) last month; now drops back in trip and grade and it wouldn't be a surprise if he made a bold bid.
runners.comment: Showed signs of a revival at Catterick and he could go well on this drop back in trip

runners.name: Falaise Blanc
runners.spotlight: Record of 1-21 but he had a near-miss in a Hamilton handicap (1m4f, good) two weeks ago; has claims if he can back that up and he won't mind if the forecast rain arrives; first-time visor replaces cheekpieces.
runners.comment: Record of 1-21 but he had a near-miss in a Hamilton handicap two weeks ago; new headgear

runners.name: Desert Quest
runners.spotlight: Five-time winner, with first four on turf (1m4f-1m6f); returned after a long absence in February but he's run well in his last two starts and was beaten less than 2l in a Newcastle handicap (12.4f, Tapeta) last time; now drops into a classified event and he has possibilities back on turf.
runners.comment: Returned after a long absence in February but he's run well in last two starts; in the mix
runners.owner: A Whillans, C Spark, J Wright

runners.name: Star Of Emerald
runners.spotlight: Unexposed 3yo but he's been well held so far including when a remote fourth on handicap debut at Catterick (1m4f, good to firm) last month; that was after a break but he needs improvement at this new trip; first-time visor.
runners.comment: Unexposed 3yo but he needs improvement at this new trip

runners.name: Late Claim
runners.spotlight: Won on handicap debut at Lingfield (1m5f, AW) in December; 0-9 since but she's finished runner-up three times and was a fair fourth behind Nala The Lioness at Windsor (11.4f, good to soft) last week; has a swing in the weights with her old rival and she's an each-way contender.
runners.comment: Fair fourth behind Nala The Lioness at Windsor and she has each-way claims

runners.name: Freak Encounter
runners.spotlight: Inconsistent 4yo who has been out of sorts in his three runs (1m/1m2f) this year; overall record is now 1-25 and he has plenty to prove at this new trip.
runners.comment: 4yo who has been out of sorts in his three runs this year and overall record is now 1-25

runners.name: Nala The Lioness
runners.spotlight: Turned things around after wind surgery with a comfortable win in a classified event at Windsor (11.4f, good to soft) 11 days ago; has to concede weight all round this time but her confidence should be boosted after that win and she's strongly respected back up in trip.
runners.comment: Turned things around after win surgery with a clearcut win at Windsor (11.4f); key player

runners.name: Another Beautiful
runners.spotlight: 14-race maiden who has finished tailed off in her last four starts and latest was in a classified event at Wolverhampton (1m4f, AW) in March; visor is now tried and she has a lot to prove after another break.
runners.comment: 14-race maiden who has finished tailed off in her last four starts; visor is now tried

runners.name: Is She Now
runners.spotlight: 22-race maiden; ran well to finish fourth in a Navan handicap (1m6f, soft) last October but she's been tailed off on the Flat and over hurdles in four subsequent runs; has plenty to prove and she needs a major revival for new yard.
runners.comment: 22-race maiden and she needs a major revival for new yard
